tasks.subject: Hard audit of founding spec + master plan index + Plan 01
tasks.notes: Audit ran via dispatched general-purpose agent with risk-auditor persona inlined (Path A adapted). Returned RED with 28 findings + DESIGN-RETHINK FLAG. Report at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-14_audit-report.md. Walkthrough produced amendment plan at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-14_amendments.md. Major outcome: Plan 01 splits into 01a/01b/01c.

tasks.subject: Terrain prep — git identity, accounts, age key, origin remote, context-file rewrite
tasks.notes: Pre-Batch-1 readiness session per Ricardo's pivot ('clean the terrain before pouring foundation'). Journal at 00_META/journal/2026-05-14_terrain-prep.md.

tasks.subject: Batch 1 — Apply spec + ADR + master index amendments (with terrain-prep corrections folded in)
tasks.notes: Three commits pushed to Gitea origin: dc5cbec (Batch 1a spec single-pass amendment), 5f126a7 (Batch 1b new ADR bodies 021bis/036/037), d5ebbf9 (Batch 1c master plan index split Plan 01 -> 01a/01b/01c). All 28 audit findings + 6 recommendations either landed or scheduled. Journal at 00_META/journal/2026-05-14_batch-1-amendments.md.

tasks.notes: Done in two commits c1b791d (v1) + e6a8eca (v2). 218.9 KB / 3409 lines final. Journal at 00_META/journal/2026-05-14_aurora-html-presentation.md.

Coordination gates marked per plan (01a Tasks 12-18 gate on JP age pubkey; 01b Tasks 7-12 gate on physical second host). Journal at 00_META/journal/2026-05-14_batch-2-plan-writes.md.

tasks.subject: JP coordination items requested 2026-05-14 — awaiting reply
tasks.notes: JP replied 2026-05-15 (Signal + Proton email) to all 6 items: (1) Telegram chat_id 459242980 ✓; (2) age pubkey via Proton email — added to infra/age-recipients.txt 2026-05-15 (closes t-jp-age-keypair); (3) OS = macOS Sequoia 15.7.3 — NOT Linux Mint as recommended (closes t-jp-os-confirmation, opens t-macos-deviation-decision); (4) Gitea — JP has no account, asked why; Ricardo will create server-side and send password via Signal (tracked in t-ricardo-jp-onboarding-actions); (5) Notion — JP created workspace and invited contacto@nexostrat.com; Ricardo to accept (tracked in t-ricardo-jp-onboarding-actions); (6) GitHub — JP confirmed plan to create new account with contacto@nexostrat.com; Ricardo to create (tracked in t-ricardo-jp-onboarding-actions).

tasks.subject: JP age keypair generation — awaiting Signal reply
tasks.notes: JP generated age keypair on jp-mac (macOS Sequoia 15.7.3) and sent pubkey via Proton email 2026-05-15. Pubkey age10k4rzha64ykqtjrjkqut6dyzxy5qexu2038lpe6gqk58l7rx4p4qrupv79 added to infra/age-recipients.txt. Format validated by encrypting test string to both recipients (age accepted both -R parses; decrypt-side requires tty for Ricardo's passphrase, deferred to Plan 01a Task 13 bidirectional roundtrip during execution). Closes CRITICAL 2 fix prerequisite. Plan 01a Tasks 12-18 unblocked from a key-on-file perspective; Task 13 roundtrip will prove JP's privkey + passphrase actually work end-to-end on the Mac.

tasks.subject: JP machine OS confirmation — awaiting Signal reply
tasks.notes: JP confirmed 2026-05-15: macOS Sequoia 15.7.3 (NOT Linux Mint as recommended). Triggers macOS-deviation work — see t-macos-deviation-decision. Concrete impacts: Plan 01a Task 6 jp-heavy.yaml currently declares os: linux-mint and needs patch; spec §3 secrets discipline (/dev/shm RAM-tmpfs + shred) is Linux-specific and needs macOS-equivalent (RAM disk via diskutil + hdiutil; shred via gshred from brew coreutils or RAM-disk unmount). age tooling itself works fine on macOS.

tasks.subject: Ricardo-side actions to complete JP onboarding (Gitea + Notion + GitHub)
tasks.notes: All three sub-actions resolved 2026-05-15 in different ways. (1) Gitea user creation: POSTPONED INDEFINITELY — JP-Light variant opts out of Gitea web (he wants results, not architecture browsing). His interface is Telegram + email + FOSS dashboard (Plan 02). User can be created in ~10 min server-side any time he asks. (2) Notion accept: CANCELLED per ADR-038 — Notion exits Nexostrat at firm level; the JP-personal Nexostrat workspace stays JP-personal. (3) GitHub account: ALREADY DONE during 2026-05-14 terrain prep (username `nexostrat`, email contacto@nexostrat.com, SSH key nexostrat_ed25519). Verified 2026-05-15 via ssh -T returning friendly greeting.

tasks.subject: Decide macOS-deviation path: quick triage patch vs full amendment cycle
tasks.notes: MOOT — JP picked Light mode 2026-05-15. Light JP never decrypts vault content locally except a one-time sentinel for Plan 01a Task 13 Direction B (innocuous content, plain /tmp is fine). The /dev/shm/shred discipline only matters for Heavy mode. jp-heavy.yaml in Plan 01a Task 6 remains as a future-state stub for whenever JP flips to Heavy; the macOS adaptation work attaches to that flip event, not to Stage 1. Plan 01a fully execute-ready as-is.

tasks.subject: Plan 02 brainstorm — pick FOSS self-hosted replacement(s) for Notion's four roles
tasks.notes: Per ADR-038. Four roles to cover: meeting capture canonical (Whisper.cpp/Jitsi/etc.), summary generation (Ollama/etc.), CRM (EspoCRM/SuiteCRM/Krayin/Twenty/Vikunja/custom), collaborative docs workspace (AppFlowy/Outline/BookStack/AFFiNE/Wiki.js/Logseq/Trilium/HedgeDoc/Gitea Wiki). All options open; Plan 02 brainstorm decides. May pick one tool covering multiple roles or specialized tools per role. JP's interface (Telegram + dashboard) means the dashboard choice is the load-bearing JP-facing decision in Plan 02.

tasks.subject: Plan 01a text amendments — fix plan-text drift surfaced during Tasks 1-11 execution
tasks.notes: DONE 2026-05-16 in commit 7e950ee as part of the post-hard-audit patch arc. All 11 process-substitution sites in 00_META/plans/2026-05-14_plan-01a-foundation.md simplified to direct -i form (10 tilde-form uses + 1 PRIV_KEY_AGE wrapper-text-in-plan), age 1.1.0+ semantics verified. Task 11 Step 3 wording fixed (head -1 AGE-SECRET-KEY-1 check → grep -q '^AGE-SECRET-KEY-1' anywhere — robust against the standard `# created` line-1 comment). Live wrapper infra/scripts/run-with-secrets.sh:53 patched in lockstep. Surfaced + fixed an unrelated 4th issue: Plan 01a's Task 3 documentation contained LITERAL sk-ant-test... fixture strings that the secret-scan hook (installed in Task 3 itself) now blocks on re-edit — patched by adopting the runtime-assembly trick the actual test_secret_scan_hook.sh already uses (PREFIX/SUFFIX/printf). Plan 01b + Plan 01c carry the same process-sub pattern; deferred to their respective re-audit cycles per hard-audit recommendation.

tasks.subject: Single-pass spec/plan touchup removing all Notion references per ADR-038
tasks.notes: DONE 2026-05-16 in commit 1b2f653 — sweep pulled forward per hard-system-audit recommendation (the audit found Notion staleness was the largest single source of finding-count; running the sweep before Plan 01b re-audit gives that re-audit a verified baseline). 8 files in single commit: spec body (header status PROPOSED→ACTIVE; ADR-024+037 flipped to Superseded; ADR-038 row added; ADR-001 substrate amended; §2 file map annotations; §5 cost table restructured; §6 state.json enum; §8 meeting capture single-canonical; §9 testing/event-taxonomy/_lib refs; Sample Chain 2; §9+§10 failure modes; §10 Open Items 1-5 closed; glossary; change log), cost-sharing-agreement.md (JP total $237-257→$207), ROLES.md, REVENUE_DISTRIBUTION.md, PARTNERSHIP_AGREEMENT.md, MANIFEST.md (NOTION row + rotation runbook hardened), pipeline _template README, master plan index (Plan 01a→DONE, dates updated, L6 wording fix). Companion task t-spec-cost-table-amendment FOLDED INTO this sweep (cost-table reality now matches across spec §5 + cost-sharing-agreement.md + PARTNERSHIP_AGREEMENT.md). ONE deferred sub-item: secrets.env.age re-encryption without NOTION_API_KEY= line — requires TTY for Ricardo's age passphrase, tracked in t-plan-01a-jp-and-tty-deferred (MANIFEST.md NOTION row marked DEPRECATED 2026-05-16 with note pointing to the TTY-deferred task).

tasks.subject: Verify Gitea bare-repo on-disk path for systemd path-watcher
tasks.notes: Resolved within Plan 01b Task 1 execution (path verification + 00_GOVERNANCE/system_map.md). Per terrain prep: /srv/gitea/data/git/repositories/nexostrat/nexostrat.git. Closes when 01b Task 1 commits.

tasks.subject: Batch 3 step 1 — Re-audit Plan 01a (independent risk-auditor pass)
tasks.notes: Dispatched 2026-05-14 via general-purpose agent with risk-auditor persona inlined (same pattern as 2026-05-14 founding-spec audit). Returned YELLOW (large): 0 CRITICAL, 7 HIGH, 5 MEDIUM, 3 LOW, no DESIGN-RETHINK FLAG. Report at 00_META/proposals/2026-05-14_plan-01a-audit-report.md. Per Ricardo's decision, the 7 HIGH findings were patched inline into Plan 01a (rather than re-running writing-plans) because the auditor's own recommended path was surgical patches; defects were localized to specific tasks. Patched: Finding 1 (gitignore *secrets* glob → surgical patterns + allowlist), Finding 2 (C1 leak-test passphrase-hang false PASS → poll-based positive+negative control), Finding 3 (secret-scan on-disk vs staged-blob → git show :path + stage-then-edit integration test), Finding 4 (SIGNED_PDF tilde quoting → $HOME), Finding 5 (Task 7 git add after rmdir → git add -A), Finding 6 (C2 reverse-direction underspecified for JP Light-mode → Signal-attachment flow), Finding 7 (run-with-secrets 2>/dev/null swallows age errors → captured-stderr log). MEDIUM/LOW deferred.

tasks.subject: Execute Plan 01a — Foundation (after re-audit)
tasks.notes: DONE 2026-05-16. Tasks 1-11 executed 2026-05-15 via superpowers:subagent-driven-development (16 commits: 10 task + 6 hardening). Tasks 12-18 autonomous parts executed 2026-05-16 via the same skill loop (6 commits): Task 12 verify-only (JP pubkey already on file b7e39bf) / ff01d52 Task 13 Direction A (encrypt sentinel + push, JP-side decrypt deferred) / f63f82b Task 14 (skipped Step 3 decrypt-verify; encrypt-side smoke confirmed 2 X25519 stanzas) / b6bfd70 Task 15 (wrapper + leak test; Steps 4-5 interactive runs deferred) / 5882af1 Task 16 + ed9a596 hardening (&&-chain age+shred in rotation runbook) / acdcc4a Task 17 reframed (markdown is the agreement; PDF encrypt + sensitive_index row skipped per 2026-05-16 directive). v0.1a-foundation tag landed on acdcc4a. F5 closed via alternate satisfaction (markdown per feedback_prefer_architecture_over_ceremony.md). C1 closed. C2 Direction A confirmed at age-parse level (two X25519 stanzas per artifact); full bidirectional decrypt roundtrip + sentinel cleanup deferred to t-plan-01a-jp-and-tty-deferred. Code-quality Minor findings (NOTION row staleness in MANIFEST.md, AGE_ERR not in cleanup trap) tracked for post-Plan-01c polish + bundled into t-spec-notion-removal-amendment scope.

tasks.subject: Plan 01a JP-side + TTY-deferred items (close C2 fully; sentinel cleanup)
tasks.notes: Deferred from Plan 01a 12-18 execution per 2026-05-16 directive (build now; JP downloads on his own schedule). NOT BLOCKING Plan 01b — Plan 01b can execute in parallel; this task can close anytime JP and Ricardo coordinate. Items: (1) Task 13 Step 2 — JP runs own-key roundtrip on jp-mac (encrypts a test sentinel to both recipients, decrypts with his key, confirms 'roundtrip works' via Signal); (2) Task 13 Direction A confirmation — JP downloads vault/keys/sentinel-ricardo-to-jp.age from Gitea web (or git clone if Heavy), decrypts via `age -d -i ~/.config/age/nexostrat.key.age sentinel-ricardo-to-jp.age`, confirms via Signal; (3) Task 13 Direction B — Ricardo Signals the recipients-file plaintext to JP; JP encrypts a sentinel to both recipients via `age -R /tmp/nexostrat-recipients.txt -o /tmp/sentinel-jp-to-ricardo.age`, Signal-attaches; Ricardo saves attachment, decrypts via `age -d -i ~/.config/age/nexostrat.key.age`, confirms back; (4) Task 13 Step 4 — sentinel cleanup commit removing both sentinel files in one `git rm` (gated on Directions A+B both confirmed); (5) Task 14 Step 3 — Ricardo decrypt-verify of secrets.env.age (TTY for passphrase); (6) Task 15 Steps 4-5 — interactive leak test run (positive + negative control); (7) Task 18 Steps 1-3 — full Plan 01a test rerun (gitignore + secret-scan + schema + leak-test) + bidirectional roundtrip + PDF check (PDF skipped per F5 alternate satisfaction). USE DIRECT `-i ~/.config/age/nexostrat.key.age` DECRYPT PATTERN — NOT process-substitution (proven by Task 11 + vault README hardening f747312; tracked broader in t-plan-01a-text-amendments). Closing this task closes C2 fully.

tasks.subject: Regenerate the 2026-05-14 presentation HTML clean from current spec
tasks.notes: Created 2026-05-16 per hard-system-audit Finding H4 recommendation. The 2026-05-14 presentation got an interim patch-in-place commit 3964d00 (16 Notion refs strike-through + banner + ADR-038 popover added), but the audit's preferred path is full regeneration from current spec + ADRs + STATUS — clean, no historical scaffolding. Mechanism exists per the presentation footer's regeneration instructions. New filename: 2026-05-XX_nexostrat-presentation.html (post-sweep date); old file moved to 00_META/proposals/archive/2026-05-14_nexostrat-presentation.html. Also: regeneration should add ADRs 016 + 018 to the popover database (currently missing); ADR-009 correctly absent (Superseded). Effort: ~1 day matching the 2026-05-14 build (brainstorm + write + iterate); reduces to ~half-day if prompted as 'minimal diff from prior version, applying ADR-038 supersessions only'. Gating: nothing — can run anytime; not blocking Plan 01b.
